name: Hawaiian Coconut Bread
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Macadamia nuts (whole is fine, or use almonds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve the liquid.
2. In a large bowl, mix all dry ingredients: yeast, bread flour, salt, sugar, and nonfat dry milk powder.
3. Add the egg, butter, shredded coconut, macadamia nuts (or almonds), and reserved pineapple liquid to the dry mixture.
4. Pour in the warm water and stir until a dough forms.
5. Place the dough on a lightly floured surface and knead until smooth.
6. Transfer the dough to a greased pan and cover with a damp cloth.
7. Allow the dough to rise until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
8. Preheat your oven according to the package instructions for white bread.
9. Once preheated, place the pan in the oven and select the white bread setting.
10. Bake the bread for the recommended time, or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
11. Remove from the oven and let cool before slicing and serving.
